rationale: Educ. Code §39.408 governs school district eligibility for grant programs based on dropout-rate correlations. It does not reference homestead exemptions, appraised value, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A school district or campus is eligible to participate in programs under Sections 29.095 and 29.096 if the district or campus exhibited during each of the three preceding school years characteristics that strongly correlate with high dropout rates.
_note: No textual or topical overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and this grant-eligibility provision.
